title: Ding On Projectile Hit [Doph]
description: Plays a ding when mobs are shot with arrows
body:
### This is a simple server-side fabric mod that plays the ENTITY_ARROW_HIT_PLAYER sound when mobs are hit by projectiles like arrows.


### Here is a video of the mod in action:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BlNh7Q6MMQs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BlNh7Q6MMQs).
### To report bugs/ make suggestions, visit the Github page
